codeReview.summary: Implementation correctly adds ConfidenceLevel enum with 4 threshold zones (Deprecated<0.3, Uncertain 0.3-0.6, Probable 0.6-0.8, Confident>0.8) to the memory system's Beta posterior. Both BetaPosterior and Procedure types expose confidence_level() method for per-memory confidence queries. Bayesian posterior updates remain unchanged via existing update() method. Comprehensive test coverage with 11 test cases covering threshold boundaries, zone transitions, serialization, and helper methods.

summary: Feature mem-confidence-bayesian passes review. The implementation adds ConfidenceLevel enum with correct 0.3-0.6-0.8 threshold zones, confidence_level() methods on BetaPosterior and Procedure, and helper methods has_sufficient_data() and total_observations(). All expected behavior verified: Bayesian posterior updates per observation, threshold-based confidence classification, and per-memory confidence queries. 11 tests added covering all new functionality. Build, clippy, and tests all pass.
